item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: Any former SMTCS students who had Mme Laroche as a teacher are invited to sign a gift for her retirement. Please stop by Mrs. Kwok's room, 127, any day at lunch to add your name.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: If your family has ordered Little Caesar's pizza kits, please note that kits will need to be picked up this Thursday, May 28, in the atrium after school

item.title: A message from Unity Club:
item.description: Don't forget that today is the last day to sign up to attend the Asian Heritage Month panel, which will take place tomorrow during period 2. The QR code to register can be found on the Unity Club poster in your classroom, or see Mrs. Kwok if you have questions.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: For all Grade 8 students attending the Friendship Lacrosse Games on Thursday, there will be a brief meeting in Mrs. Curtis' room at morning break.

item.title: A message from M. Benoit:
item.description: A reminder about 7&8 flag football today after school and Thursday until 3:30.

item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan:
item.description: Garden Club will be meeting after school this Wednesday and Thursday to do some spring cleanup. Please see our Teams page for more details.

item.title: A message from Ms. Montgomery.
item.description: The second and last 7/8 Girls Softball tryout is Monday, June 1 2:20 - 3:30, (not today). Please make sure that your ride home is at the school right after practice.
